headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 21, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox secured a 6-8 victory over the Detroit Tigers, handing the Tigers their loss. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. In other action, the Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians in a decisive 9-2 victory, with Isaac Paredes leading the charge at the plate. Paredes hit two home runs, including a fly ball to left field, and drove in two runs in the game. The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Edwin Díaz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies. The Seattle Mariners have placed 3B Miles Mastrobuoni on the 60-day injured list due to a right calf strain and 2B Brendan Donovan on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a left groin muscle strain. The Kansas City Royals have placed 2B Jonathan India on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 19, 2026, due to a left shoulder subluxation.

The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers have traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets have traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks have traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies have traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall to Red Sox in 8-6 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 6-8 victory over the Detroit Tigers, handing the Tigers their loss. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Blast Past Guardians 9-2**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians in a decisive 9-2 victory, with Isaac Paredes leading the charge at the plate. Paredes hit two home runs, including a fly ball to left field, and drove in two runs in the game.

top_news.title: **Reds Take Down Rays 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win. Sal Stewart led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 3-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, marking their defeat in the matchup. Agustín Ramírez led the Cardinals' offense with a home run, 1 RBI, and 4 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Díaz Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Edwin Díaz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies. The move was made on April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. This trade adds depth to the Astros' infield.
